product.title: M. Asam Magic Finish Make-Up Mousse (1.01 Fl Oz) – 4in1 Primer, Foundation, Concealer & Powder With Buildable Coverage, Hides Redness And Dark Spots, Vegan, For Light To Medium Skin Tones
featureBullets: ✅ 4 IN 1 MAKE UP PRODUCT: Primer, makeup foundation, concealer and finishing powder all in one. Provides a flawless, matt and weightless finish. Hides redness, wrinkles, lines and dark circles
✅ SILKY TEXTURE, LIGHTWEIGHT FINISH: The make up texture conceals uneven skin tones for a matt, natural looking finish and provides light to medium coverage depending on application
✅ EASY TO APPLY: Apply over day cream and blend evenly. Repeat until the desired coverage is achieved. The mousse can be applied and blended with a firm brush, a make up sponge or with the fingers
✅ FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Mousse adapts to the skin color. Available tones: Deep Teint for medium to deep skin tone, Summer Teint (medium), base shade (light to medium), Porcelain Teint (fair)
✅ VEGAN AND CRUELTY FREE: clean beauty make up product formulated without alcohol, parabens, talc, phthalates. Made in Germany by asambeauty - a company with a decades-long tradition

variants.title: 1.01 Fl Oz (Pack of 1) Light skin tones
1.01 Fl Oz (Pack of 1) Deeper skin tones
1.01 Fl Oz (Pack of 1) Light to medium skin tones
1.01 Fl Oz (Pack of 1) Medium to deep skin tones

specification.value: Dark Spots, Hide, Redness, Skin, Uneven Skin Tone, Wrinkles, buildable coverage, dark circles, full coverage, skin imperfections
#4,404 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #56 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers praise the foundation's buildable coverage and silky texture that feels like silk on the skin. The product receives positive feedback for its effectiveness, smooth application, and ability to create a radiant, airbrushed look. Customers find it lightweight, with one noting it covers completely without feeling heavy. Regarding longevity and color match, opinions are mixed - while some say it wears well all day, others mention it rubs off, and while some find the color perfect for their skin tone, others say it's too dark.

reviews.reviewText: This foundation surprised me greatly! The coverage and consistency of the product works so well for a person over 50. The product does not stay in creases, is not sticky, and feels like air because it is so lightweight. It feels as if you are not wearing makeup. The color blends right in and is true to shade. I always purchase light to medium color products and this is perfect. A little goes a long way so the price is not bad. This is my new go to makeup And I definitely like it better than Jones.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I am an M Asam fan. I tried this M Asam Magic Finish Mousse to avoid whole face foundation for days that I’m lazy, but want to be presentable. I have developed Rosesea. This almost covers it completely yet blends with my light olive complexion. When I saw how dark it is, I didn’t think I could wear it, but it seams to blend very well! It’s very silky in texture. I used it over M Asam Aqua Intense, Supreme Hyaluron Cream once it was absorbed fully. I’ve used the moisture cream day and nite for years. I’ve also used many other of the MAsam line. They are all great quality products at a reasonable price.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I was skeptical about this product, but the reviews were so positive, I gave it a try. So glad that I did! First off, it's different than anything I've ever used. The first time I opened it, I thought, this is too dark (I bought the "light to medium"), and it looks messy (because it is a "mousse"). I applied it with my finger tips and, wow, what a surprise! It isn't too dark for my skin. It goes on like silk. It covers fine lines, light spots and blotchy redness and gives my face a smooth, even toned look. I used a light moisturizer with spf 30 first then applied this Magic Finish. A little blush, some eye makeup and I'm finished! No powder needed. Best of all, it doesn't mind if you sweat. Blot your face a little and it still looks flawless. It doesn't transfer to the tissue or clothes and washes off easily with soap and water. I live in the south, so the heat and humidity are not kind to foundation makeup. Magic Finish holds up and looks great from morning until night. I'm 66, still going through that, "special time of life", where my skin is a hot mess some days. Spots, fine lines, redness, you name it. This Magic Finish us my new best friend. It's a little pricey, but you don't use a lot, so it will last. Buy this, you won't be sorry.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 19, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Works really well for 40+ with my skin textures only reason it’s not a 5 is because hr settles in pores by end of day, but does last longer and look bettter then most
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Fantastic product! Adds just a subtle smoothing to the skin, allowing you to look your very best. Great for older skin, smooth, lightweight, doesn't sit in pores, just amazing! I personally love that it's vegan and free from animal cruelty. Great product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 14, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is quite different than any make-up I’ve used. I’m almost 70, my skin is blotchy and finding a foundation that covers my skin without looking caked on has been a challenge. I decided to try this. It has a wonderful texture and you can apply it with a kabuki brush in virtually no time at all, it goes on very smoothly and has a nice finish. If you are older use a moisturizer before applying the mousse and don’t use much of the mousse because too much produces a dry caked appearance. It does cover nicely and I’m happy with this product, it seems to hold up well all day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 4, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Didn’t cover very well was easy to put on it was very smooth but was not satisfied with the final results
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I absolutely LOVE this product. I bought the two darkest shades offered. I feel like my perfect shade might be somewhere between the two. But this shade is very close and I will purchase again. The tint is thin, light and spreads so nicely, providing a really great base for makeup. Lately I've been wearing this alone with nothing more than lipstick/lip gloss and mascara. It's a bit pricey but I think it's worth it. A little goes a long way.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026
